ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_info" (
  "sys_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system information entry */,
  "what" TEXT /* Name of the system property (e.g., java.vm.specification.version) */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Type of system information (e.g., sysinfo) */,
  "bundle_id" TEXT /* Bundle ID associated with the system information */,
  "bundle_version" TEXT /* Bundle version associated with the system information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system information */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system information was recorded */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the system information */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating System */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* System Architecture */,
  "jvm_version" TEXT /* JVM version */,
  "jvm_vendor" TEXT /* JVM vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sys_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application entry */,
  "bundle_id" TEXT /* Bundle ID of the application */,
  "bundle_version" TEXT /* Bundle version of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Application name */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Application type (e.g., web, desktop, mobile) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Application category (e.g., productivity, game, utility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "view_name" TEXT /* Name of the view (e.g., system information, application resources) */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., dashboard, chart, table) */,
  "view_description" TEXT /* Description of the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_info_views" (
  "sys_info_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system information view association */,
  "sys_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system information entry */,
  "view_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view */,
  "view_config" TEXT /* View configuration (e.g., layout, columns, filters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sys_info_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_info_views_sys_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("sys_info_id") REFERENCES system_info ("sys_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_info_views_view_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_id") REFERENCES views ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., activated, deactivated) */,
  "bundle_id" TEXT /* Bundle ID associated with the event */,
  "bundle_version" TEXT /* Bundle version associated with the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_level" TEXT /* Event level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "event_message" TEXT /* Event message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "department" TEXT /* User department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_events" (
  "user_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user event association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* User action (e.g., activated, deactivated, viewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_info_history" (
  "sys_info_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system information history entry */,
  "sys_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system information entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system information was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system information */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., updated, deleted, inserted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sys_info_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_info_history_sys_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("sys_info_id") REFERENCES system_info ("sys_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "event_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event history entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_level" TEXT /* Event level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_metrics" (
  "app_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application metric entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "sys_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system metric entry */,
  "sys_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system information entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sys_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_metrics_sys_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("sys_info_id") REFERENCES system_info ("sys_info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "event_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event notification entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_thresholds" (
  "sys_threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system threshold entry */,
  "sys_info_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system information entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "threshold_value" TEXT /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sys_threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_thresholds_sys_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("sys_info_id") REFERENCES system_info ("sys_info_id")
)
